{
  "society_power": 5.0,
  "state_power": 7.0,
  "society_change": -1.0,
  "state_change": 1.0,
  "key_event": "1964 Independence and 1968 One-Party State",
  "reasoning": "Independence and nationalization increased state power, while the one-party state and political polarization weakened civil society."
}
